name: Offensus Index
description: Celeri unius numeri indicator de hemodynamic stabilitatis. Ratione ut HR / SBP. Normalis 0.5-0.7.
instructions: Cor rate per systoles divide sanguinem pressura. A ortu inpulsa index depravationem indicat.

scoring.label: Gravis concussa - immediata resuscitatio, sanguinem products

obstetric.note: Obstetricante Offensus Index (OSI) eadem formula utitur. SI >0.9 in aegros gravidis notabile est. Normalis HR est in graviditate altior (80-100 bpm).
